mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTIFICATIONS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NOTIFICATIONS ( notification_id, user_id, notification_category, channel, title, message, link_url, sent_yn, read_yn, batch_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{notificationCategory}, #{channel}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'N', #{batchId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT ALL
INTO NOTIFICATIONS ( notification_id, user_id, notification_category, channel, title, message, link_url, sent_yn, read_yn, batch_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTIFICATIONS.NEXTVAL, #{n.userId}, #{n.notificationCategory}, #{n.channel}, #{n.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.message, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{n.linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'N', #{n.batchId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATIONS SET read_yn = 'Y', read_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTIFICATION_BATCHES.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION_BATCHES ( batch_id, notification_category, title, message, link_url, channels, target_type, target_ref_id, status, scheduled_at, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{notificationCategory}, #{title}, #{message, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{channels}, #{targetType}, #{targetRefId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status}, #{scheduledAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, a1.admin_name AS created_by_name, a2.admin_name AS sent_by_name FROM NOTIFICATION_BATCHES b LEFT JOIN ADMINS a1 ON b.created_by = a1.admin_id LEFT JOIN ADMINS a2 ON b.sent_by = a2.admin_id WHERE b.batch_id = #{batchId}

SELECT b.*, a1.admin_name AS created_by_name, a2.admin_name AS sent_by_name FROM NOTIFICATION_BATCHES b LEFT JOIN ADMINS a1 ON b.created_by = a1.admin_id LEFT JOIN ADMINS a2 ON b.sent_by = a2.admin_id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION_BATCHES SET status = #{status}, recipient_count = #{recipientCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, sent_by = #{sentBy}, sent_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT user_id FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND push_enabled = 'Y'
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS WHERE terms_id = #{termsId} AND agreed_yn = 'Y'
SELECT DISTINCT uca.user_id FROM USER_CARD_APPLICATIONS uca WHERE uca.card_id = #{cardId} AND uca.status_code = 'APPROVED'
SELECT user_id FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND marketing_agree = 'Y'
SELECT user_id AS userId, push_token AS pushToken FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND push_enabled = 'Y' AND push_token IS NOT NULL AND user_id IN #{uid}
SELECT email FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND email IS NOT NULL AND user_id IN #{uid}
